html:
2026-0503
2026-05-28FINCustoms TariffOrder Amending the Ukraine Goods Remission Order Order Amending the Ukraine Goods Remission Order in order to remit of customs duties for all goods originating in Ukraine and imported into Canada, with the exception for over-access supply-managed products, from June 10, 2026 to June 9, 2027.Registration: SOR/2026-0095 Publication Date: 2026-06-17
subject: Order Amending the Ukraine Goods Remission Order
precis: Order Amending the Ukraine Goods Remission Order in order to remit of customs duties for all goods originating in Ukraine and imported into Canada, with the exception for over-access supply-managed products, from June 10, 2026 to June 9, 2027.
